pack.name: Refrigerator Maintenance
pack.description: Refrigerator cleaning, filter replacement, and temperature checks.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

tasks.name: Replace refrigerator water filter
tasks.description: Replace the refrigerator water filter cartridge.
tasks.instructions: Install a compatible filter, flush according to the manual, and reset the refrigerator filter indicator if present.

tasks.name: Clean refrigerator coils
tasks.description: Vacuum dust from condenser coils and rear/bottom vents.
tasks.instructions: Unplug if required by the manual, remove grille/panel, vacuum dust, and restore airflow around the appliance.

tasks.name: Check refrigerator and freezer temperature
tasks.description: Confirm refrigerator and freezer temperatures are in a safe range.
tasks.instructions: Use an appliance thermometer and adjust settings if needed.
